channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Using GLP-1s to maintain a normal weight? There are benefits and risks
item.description: Drugs like Zepbound and Wegovy are intended for people who are overweight. Some patients are using them after bariatric surgery to keep pounds from cr...

item.title: 6 GOP reps defy Trump to block Canadian tariffs. And, student loan defaults rise
item.description: Six House Republicans joined Democrats to successfully block Trump's Canadian tariffs. And, roughly a million borrowers defaulted on their federal stu...

item.title: U.S. cross-country star Jessie Diggins claims bronze, medaling in third straight Olympics
item.description: She's done it again. Jessie Diggins, age 34 and skiing in her final Olympics, captured a bronze medal for the U.S. at the Milan Cortina Games. She bat...

item.title: Court rebuffs plea from domestic workers for better pay and respect
item.description: They're often paid low wages and lack job protections. A petition to the country's supreme court to support their demands did not see success — and th...

item.title: Spy agency says Kim Jong Un's daughter is close to be North Korea's future leader
item.description: Seoul's assessment comes as North Korea is preparing to hold its biggest political conference later this month, where Kim is expected to outline his m...

item.title: US FTC airs concerns over allegations that Apple News suppresses right-wing content
item.description: In a letter to Apple CEO Tim Cook, FTC chair Andrew Ferguson cited reports from Media Research Center, a right-leaning think tank, which accused Apple...

item.title: Apple acquires all rights to Severance, will produce future seasons in-house
item.description: The show is expected to run for four seasons, with the possibility of spin-offs, a prequel, and foreign versions.

item.title: Eclipse backs all-EV marketplace Ever in $31M funding round
item.description: The San Francisco-based startup says its AI-first approach has allowed it to scale faster.

item.title: Buying (and Building) Houses Could Get a LOT Easier (New Bill)
item.description: This could be the most important shift in the housing market in years. Something truly remarkable just happened that will impact almost every facet of...

item.title: FBI combs desert terrain for clues in Nancy Guthrie’s disappearance
xAI lays out interplanetary ambitions in public all-hands
item.description: On Wednesday, xAI took the rare step of publishing its full 45-minute all-hands presentation to the X platform, making it widely available.

item.title: The 2026 Value-Add Real Estate Playbook (30% – 50% ROIs)
item.description: What if you could create home equity and cash flow out of nothing? It’s not magic. We’ve done it hundreds of times, and most real estate investors sti...

item.title: 3 Reasons Why You Haven’t Bought Your First Rental Property (Yet)
item.description: If you’re like most rookies, you probably won’t buy a rental property in 2026. After all, there are too many things working against you: high mortgage...

item.title: Pentagon let CBP use anti-drone laser before FAA closed El Paso airspace, AP sources say
item.description: The agency says it will ground all flights to and from the airport for “special security reasons.”

item.title: Over 60% of Buyers Bought Below Asking Price Last Year, With the Largest Discounts Since 2012
item.description: For most of us, the frenzied bidding wars and constant price hikes of the post-pandemic housing boom are recent memories. That’s why it might come as ...

item.title: AI inference startup Modal Labs in talks to raise at $2.5B valuation, sources say
item.description: General Catalyst is in talks to lead the round for the four-year-old startup, according to our sources.

item.title: Few leads in Guthrie investigation after 11 days, yet cases often break unexpectedly
Bank-Owned Homes Grew Rapidly at the End of 2025—Are We in a New Era of Distress?
item.description: When foreclosure activity reaches the REO stage, it represents the outcome of financial distress. The homeowner is no longer in the picture, the aucti...
